acceptance_criteria.AC-1: CONNECTING state shows ActivityIndicator spinner + 'Connecting...' label using colors.primary
acceptance_criteria.AC-2: LISTENING state shows Animated pulsing dot + 'Listening...' label
acceptance_criteria.AC-3: ERROR state shows AlertCircle icon, errorMessage text, Retry button with testID='voice-overlay-retry-button'
acceptance_criteria.AC-4: SPEAKING state shows staggered waveform bars with smooth Animated transitions from LISTENING
acceptance_criteria.AC-5: All colors use useTheme().colors.*, spacing uses spacing.*, radii use radius.*

remediation_summary: Replaced hardcoded pixel values in StyleSheet.create with theme tokens. borderRadius:12->radius.xl, borderRadius:8->radius.lg, borderRadius:3->radius.sm, marginBottom:16->spacing.lg, paddingHorizontal:24->spacing.xl. Token values passed as props to sub-components. Fixed visual dimensions without token equivalents kept with explanatory comments.
